---
title: "Design"
subtitle: "Where elsa departs from the published v2.0 scheme, and why"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

The page below is rendered from `docs/DESIGN.md`, the design record kept in the
source tree. It is the single source of truth for the modelling and numerical
decisions; every departure from Rieckh et al. (2024) is stated here with its
consequence, because each one changes results.

{{< include DESIGN.md >}}
